title: Modern Industrialization 3D Hammer
description: Let the hammer form mod Modern Industrialization have a 3D model.
body:
This Resource Packs let the hammer form mod [Modern Industrialization](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-industrialization) have a 3D model.

I’m just a beginner, so if there are any issues, please point them out and I will try my best to correct them.😊

You can see these images in gallery.
